raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J12345",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 2,
    "RX.3": 4,
    "RX.4": 4,
    "RX.5": 2
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent identifies some prior work (Taylor et al., 2012, IPCC AR5) but does not map against the nearest 3-5 works to articulate sharp vs rhetorical delta.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags one missing or wrong citation (CMIP6), but does not audit every load-bearing citation with bibliographic precision.",
    "RX.1": "The output presents some uncertainty disclosure, but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The output mostly adheres to the scope, with one minor drift in the comparison to uniform random subsampling.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free, with no new errors or fabrications introduced.",
    "RX.5": "The output blends sources without traceability, lacking annotation of non-cosmetic changes."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.6,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent identifies some prior work (Taylor et al., 2012, IPCC AR5) but does not map against the nearest 3-5 works to articulate sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags one missing or wrong citation (CMIP6), but does not audit every load-bearing citation with bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: The output presents some uncertainty disclosure, but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output mostly adheres to the scope, with one minor drift in the comparison to uniform random subsampling.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free, with no new errors or fabrications introduced.
rationale.RX.5: The output blends sources without traceability, lacking annotation of non-cosmetic changes.
